Style.Name: default-style-coastlines
Style.Title: coastlines style
Style.Abstract: Default style for coastlines layer

Layer.Name: emodnet:contours
Layer.Title: Depth contours
Layer.Abstract: Generalised bathymetric contour lines. (50, 100, 200, 500, 1000, 2000, 5000 meter interval)

Style.Name: contours
Style.Title: Depth contours
Style.Abstract: Generalised bathymetric contour lines

Layer.Name: emodnet:download_tiles
Layer.Title: Bathymetry product tiles
Layer.Abstract: Download schema for Bathymetry products tiles (most recent release)

Layer.Name: emodnet:hr_bathymetry_area
Layer.Title: High resolution bathymetric data
Layer.Abstract: Layer with EMODnet bathymetry show case areas available in a higher resolution than 1/16 arc minute

Style.Name: hr_bathymetry_area
Style.Title: HR Bathymetry Areas
Style.Abstract: Coverage where high resolution bathymetry is available

Layer.Name: emodnet:mean
Layer.Title: Mean depth
Layer.Abstract: Mean depth based on source resolution of 1/16 arc minute (~125 meter). Ocean overlay without land cover.

Style.Name: atlas_land
Style.Title: Atlas colour without hill shading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in traditional atlas style colours.

Style.Name: multicolour
Style.Title: Multi colour without hillshading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in a multi colour style

Style.Name: rainbowcolour
Style.Title: Rainbow colour without hillshading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in a rainbow colour style

Layer.Name: emodnet:mean_2016
Layer.Title: Mean depth (DTM release 2016)
Layer.Abstract: Mean depth based on source resolution of 1/8 arc minute (~250 meter). Ocean overlay without land cover.

Style.Name: atlas_land
Style.Title: Atlas colour without hill shading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in traditional atlas style colours.

Style.Name: multicolour
Style.Title: Multi colour without hillshading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in a multi colour style

Style.Name: rainbowcolour
Style.Title: Rainbow colour without hillshading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in a rainbow colour style

Layer.Name: emodnet:mean_2018
Layer.Title: Mean depth (DTM release 2018)
Layer.Abstract: Mean depth based on source resolution of 1/16 arc minute (~125 meter). Ocean overlay without land cover.

Style.Name: atlas_land
Style.Title: Atlas colour without hill shading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in traditional atlas style colours.

Style.Name: multicolour
Style.Title: Multi colour without hillshading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in a multi colour style

Style.Name: rainbowcolour
Style.Title: Rainbow colour without hillshading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in a rainbow colour style

Layer.Name: emodnet:mean_2020
Layer.Title: Mean depth (DTM release 2020)
Layer.Abstract: Mean depth based on source resolution of 1/16 arc minute (~125 meter). Ocean overlay without land cover.

Style.Name: atlas_land
Style.Title: Atlas colour without hill shading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in traditional atlas style colours.

Style.Name: multicolour
Style.Title: Multi colour without hillshading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in a multi colour style

Style.Name: rainbowcolour
Style.Title: Rainbow colour without hillshading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in a rainbow colour style

Layer.Name: emodnet:mean_2022
Layer.Title: Mean depth (DTM release 2022)
Layer.Abstract: Mean depth based on source resolution of 1/16 arc minute (~125 meter). Ocean overlay without land cover.

Style.Name: atlas_land
Style.Title: Atlas colour without hill shading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in traditional atlas style colours.

Style.Name: multicolour
Style.Title: Multi colour without hillshading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in a multi colour style

Style.Name: rainbowcolour
Style.Title: Rainbow colour without hillshading
Style.Abstract: Depth visualised in a rainbow colour style

Layer.Name: emodnet:mean_atlas_land
Layer.Title: Mean depth full coverage with land coverage
Layer.Abstract: Mean depth based on source resolution of 1/16 arc minute (~125 meter). Full coverage ocean and land DTM in traditional atlas style colours.

Style.Name: mean_atlas_land
Style.Title: Mean depth in atlas colour with land
Style.Abstract: Mean depth visualised in traditional atlas style colours.

Layer.Name: emodnet:mean_multicolour
Layer.Title: Mean depth in multi colour
Layer.Abstract: Mean depth based on source resolution of 1/16 arc minute (~125 meter). Ocean overlay without land cover in multi colour style.

Style.Name: mean_multicolour
Style.Title: Mean depth in multi colour
Style.Abstract: Mean depth visualised in a multi colour style

Layer.Name: emodnet:mean_rainbowcolour
Layer.Title: Mean depth rainbow colour ramp
Layer.Abstract: Mean depth based on source resolution of 1/16 arc minute (~125 meter). Ocean overlay without land cover in rainbow (multi) colour ramp style.

Style.Name: mean_rainbowcolour
Style.Title: Mean depth in rainbow colour
Style.Abstract: Mean depth visualised in a rainbow colour style

Layer.Name: emodnet:quality_index
Layer.Title: Quality index
Layer.Abstract: Representation of various quality indicators for the individual bathymetric surveys and composite DTM’s that contribute to the EMODnet Bathymetry DTM

Style.Name: sea_names
Style.Title: Sea names
Style.Abstract: Sea names

Layer.Name: emodnet:source_references
Layer.Title: Source references
Layer.Abstract: Coverage of individual bathymetric surveys and Composite DTMs that contribute to the EMODnet Bathymetry DTM.

Style.Name: source_reference
Style.Title: Source Reference - Colour per unique identifier
Style.Abstract: Source reference - random colour per unique identifier

Style.Name: source_reference_types
Style.Title: Source Reference - Types
Style.Abstract: Coverage grouped by source type

Style.Name: gebco:undersea_features
Style.Title: Under Sea features
Style.Abstract: Under sea lines
